title: Scuba Diver Displacement
body: A scuba diver makes a slow descent into the ocean. His vertical position with respect to a boat on the surface changes as follows: descends $$9.0$$ $$m$$, ascends $$3.0$$ $$m$$, descends $$12.0$$ $$m$$, ascends $$4.0$$ $$m$$, descends $$18.0$$ $$m$$, ascends $$7.0$$ $$m$$, and descends $$24.0$$ $$m$$. Assuming the positive direction is up toward the surface, express his net vertical displacement vector in terms of the unit vector j. What is his distance to the boat?
